description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the clojure:lein-2.8.1 Docker image and defines two stages: test and deploy. Add a test job in the test stage that runs the command `lein test`. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that runs `lein do clean, codox` then `mv ./target/doc ./public`, publishes the `public/` directory as a pages artifact, and is limited to the master branch. Add a deploy job in the deploy stage that runs `lein with-profile ci deploy clojars` and also only runs on the master branch. No caches, services, or additional variables are required.
